import React from 'react'; const About: React.FC = () => (

About Me

I'm Raghv Bhatia — an IT professional who thrives on solving technical challenges and improving IT workflows. Experienced in desktop support, cloud platforms, and end-user troubleshooting. Known for taking ownership, staying calm under pressure, and delivering results in fast-paced environments, with a strong focus on problem solving and continuous learning.

Currently working as a Technology Digital Experience Partner at Farmlands Co-operative Ltd, where I lead IT support, hardware deployments, vendor management, and new retail site launches across New Zealand.

Certifications

  • AWS Cloud Practitioner
  • Azure Cloud Fundamentals — AZ-900
  • Azure Administrator Associate — AZ-104
  • ISC2 Certified in Cybersecurity (CC)
  • Performing a Technical Security Audit & Assessment — LinkedIn Learning
  • PowerShell: Automating IT Administration — LinkedIn Learning
  • Cybersecurity with Cloud Computing — LinkedIn Learning

Soft Skills

  • Ability to work collaboratively within cross-functional teams
  • Strong communication and customer service
  • Self-motivated and positive thinking individual
  • Efficiently managing time to meet deadlines and prioritize tasks
  • Attention to detail — accurate system configuration and hardware setup
  • Adaptability — adjusting to new technologies and rapidly changing business
  • Excellent problem-solving and critical thinking abilities
📍 Location: New Zealand    📞 Phone: +64 21 0903 7606    ✉ Email: Raghvv.bhatia@gmail.com
); export default About;
